nasb.text: Go then, eat your bread in happiness and drink your wine with a cheerful heart; for God has already approved your works.

esv.text: Go, eat your bread with joy, and drink your wine with a merry heart, for God has already approved what you do.

cnv.text: 你只管快快樂樂地去吃你的飯，懷著高興的心去喝你的酒，因為　神已經悅納了你所作的。

ccb.text: 去欢欢喜喜、快快乐乐地吃喝吧！因为上帝已经悦纳你所做的。

csbs.text: 去吧！欢欢喜喜地吃你的饭，心中快乐地喝你的酒；因为神已经悦纳你所做的。
